# Pre-AIOS wiki snapshot

**Original repo path:** `/Users/justinlobaito/repos/inside-out/`
**Original folder path (relative):** `wiki/`
**Date staged:** 2026-05-23
**Source format:** LLM-Wiki pattern (Karpathy) at project root — flat markdown with `SCHEMA.md`, `index.md`, `log.md`, `overview.md`, `site-map.md`, `locations.md`, `services-overview.md`, plus subfolders `brand/`, `services/`, `pages/`, `sources/`, `decisions/`. Already largely AIOS-compatible in spirit but used (a) sequential `NNNN-<slug>.md` decision numbering, (b) a single `log.md` file rather than `log/<date>-<slug>.md`, (c) wikilink-style `[[label]]` cross-references in some pages, (d) no `plans/`/`architecture/`/`strategy/`/`research/` sections.
**File count:** 16 markdown files (4 brand, 4 services drafts, 1 source, plus overview/index/log/SCHEMA/site-map/locations/services-overview) + `.gitkeep` placeholders for `decisions/`, `services/`, `pages/`, `sources/`.

This snapshot is immutable. The curated, schema-converted versions live under `docs/wiki/` and are linked from the source summary at [../../../sources/2026-05-23-pre-aios-wiki-import.md](../../../sources/2026-05-23-pre-aios-wiki-import.md).
